Short CV

Ayşe YILDIRIM was born in 1995. YILDIRIM received her undergraduate education from Çanakkale Onsekiz Mart University Department of Emergency and Disaster Management in 2017 and completed her master's degree in Çanakkale Onsekiz Mart University, Department of Risk Management of Natural Disasters in 2019. Currently, Ayşe YILDIRIM is working as an Instructor in the Emergency and Disaster Management Program of the Vocational School of Health Services.
